evidence.snippet: With industry-leading quality control measures in place, FT technologies manufactures professional-grade wind sensors that are chosen for a range of demanding applications. Whether you want to upgrade your wind turbines, gain weather warnings for critical infrastructure or get accurate wind data for your autopilot, FT wind sensors ensure you receive reliable data 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

Today, FT’s innovations continue to lead the industry. The 752 series measuring wind speeds of up to 90 m/s, and designed for industrial markets or professional use, including wind turbine control, commercial marine, performance sailing, drones and many other critical safety and control applications.

items.notes: Ultrasonic wind sensors (anemometers) used in drone navigation/autopilot systems, among many other industrial applications

evidence.snippet: FT Technologies has been designing and manufacturing acoustic resonance wind sensors for over 35 years. As a leading supplier to the wind turbine industry for more than 20 years, we design and manufacture all our wind sensors in the UK and export them globally.

readiness.notes: Designing and manufacturing wind sensors for over 35 years; ISO 9001 accredited

tagline: Ultrasonic wind anemometers for unmanned systems and marine applications, including drone-mounted sensors (FT205) and JMA-certified models (FT7, FT752 series). UK-based, production-ready. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence on US defense contracts absent.
